title: Bài kiểm tra nâng cao #14 — Data Science & Statistical Analysis
description: 60 câu: statistics, EDA, sklearn, feature engineering, product analytics.
disclaimer: Đây chỉ là đề cương ôn tập cộng đồng, không cam kết giống đề thật VinUni.

questions.prompt: Pearson r=-0.85 cho thấy:
questions.explanation: r gần -1: strong negative linear correlation

questions.prompt: p-value=0.03, α=0.05. Kết luận:
questions.explanation: p<α → reject null hypothesis. Statistical significance

questions.prompt: R²=0.65 nghĩa là:
questions.explanation: R²: proportion of variance explained by model

questions.prompt: Box plot KHÔNG hiển thị điều gì?
questions.explanation: Box plot: min,Q1,median,Q3,max,outliers. Mean KHÔNG được display (cần dùng mean marker riêng)

questions.prompt: Right-skewed distribution: mean so với median:
questions.explanation: Right skew: long tail bên phải → outliers pull mean lên trên median

questions.prompt: Confidence interval 95%: (45, 55). Đúng nhất là:

options.text: 95% of such intervals sẽ contain true mean

questions.explanation: Frequentist CI: 95% repeated sampling CIs contain true parameter

questions.prompt: 'Multicollinearity' trong regression xảy ra khi:

options.text: Independent variables có strong correlation với nhau

questions.explanation: Multicollinearity: correlated features → unstable coefficients. Check với VIF

questions.prompt: P(A)=0.1, P(B|A)=0.9, P(B)=0.15. P(A|B) theo Bayes = ?
'Type I error' là:

options.text: Reject H0 khi H0 đúng (false positive)
Fail to reject H0 khi H0 sai (false negative)

questions.explanation: Type I: α error = false positive. Type II: β error = false negative. Power = 1-β

questions.prompt: 'Effect size' (Cohen's d) đo:

options.text: Practical significance: magnitude của difference giữa groups

questions.explanation: Effect size: practical importance, independent of sample size. Large n → tiny difference có thể significant nhưng trivial

questions.prompt:

```python
import pandas as pd
df=pd.DataFrame({'x':[1,2,3,4,5],'y':[2,4,5,4,5]})
print(round(df['x'].corr(df['y']),2))
```
questions.explanation: Pearson correlation của x và y ≈ 0.90

questions.prompt:
```python
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
import numpy as np
X=np.array([[1,np.nan],[np.nan,3],[4,5]])
imp=SimpleImputer(strategy='mean')
print(imp.fit_transform(X)[1][0])
```
questions.explanation: col0 mean=(1+4)/2=2.5. impute NaN → 2.5

questions.explanation: Group A: 2 records → count=2

```python
from sklearn.feature_selection import VarianceThreshold
import numpy as np
X=np.array([[0,2,0],[0,1,4],[0,1,1]])
sel=VarianceThreshold(threshold=0)
X_new=sel.fit_transform(X)
print(X_new.shape[1])
```
questions.explanation: col0: all zeros, var=0 → removed. 2 cols remain

questions.prompt: 'A/B/n testing' trong product analytics là:

options.text: Simultaneously test n variants để find optimal version

questions.explanation: A/B/n: multi-variant test. More variants → find optimal faster nhưng cần more traffic

questions.prompt: 'Novelty effect' trong A/B testing là:

options.text: Users engage more với new variant simply because it's new

questions.explanation: Novelty effect: initial lift disappears → run test long enough, analyze exposure cohorts

questions.prompt: 'Feature interaction' trong ML là:

options.text: Combined effect của 2+ features lớn hơn sum of individual effects

questions.explanation: Interaction: x1×x2 term. Linear model cần explicit feature engineering hoặc dùng tree-based models

questions.prompt: 'Holdout set' khác 'validation set' như thế nào?

options.text: Holdout = final test set (chỉ dùng 1 lần sau model selection)

questions.explanation: Validation: tune hyperparams. Holdout/test: final unbiased evaluation. Dùng test set nhiều lần → leakage

questions.prompt: 'Funnel analysis' trong product metrics phân tích:
questions.explanation: Funnel: track users through conversion steps. Drop-off at each step → identify friction points

questions.prompt: 'Cohort analysis' trong product analytics phân tích:

options.text: Users nhóm theo shared characteristic để track behavior over time

questions.explanation: Cohort: track retention, LTV của users acquired trong same period → understand lifecycle

questions.prompt: Khi build fraud detection model, metric quan trọng nhất thường là:

options.text: Recall (minimize missed fraud) với acceptable Precision

questions.explanation: Fraud: high cost of missing fraud → maximize Recall. Balance với Precision dựa trên business cost

questions.prompt: 'Batch prediction' phù hợp khi:
questions.explanation: Batch: score millions offline, store results → query when needed. Cost-efficient cho non-RT use cases

questions.prompt: 'Multi-arm bandit' vs A/B test:

options.text: MAB: adaptively allocate traffic to better variants (explore-exploit)

questions.explanation: MAB: Thompson Sampling, UCB1 → reduce regret. A/B: simpler, cleaner statistical inference

questions.prompt: 'Precision@K' trong information retrieval đo:

options.text: Fraction of top-K retrieved items that are relevant

questions.explanation: P@K: of top K recommendations, how many are relevant? Quan trọng cho search và recommendation

questions.prompt: 'Data flywheel' trong AI product là:

options.text: More users → more data → better model → better product (virtuous cycle)

questions.explanation: Data flywheel: network effect của data. Large user base → continuous improvement advantage

questions.prompt: 'Survival analysis' trong AI phù hợp với:

options.text: Predict time until event (churn, failure) với censored data

questions.explanation: Survival analysis: Kaplan-Meier, Cox PH → churn prediction với time component, equipment failure

questions.prompt: 'NDCG' (Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain) đo gì?

options.text: Ranking quality: considers both relevance và position của items

questions.explanation: NDCG: penalizes relevant items at lower positions. DCG = Σ rel_i/log₂(i+1). Normalize by ideal DCG

questions.prompt: 'Heterogeneous treatment effects' trong A/B testing là:

options.text: Treatment effect varies across user subgroups → cần segment analysis

questions.explanation: HTE: treatment có thể help một số users nhưng harm others → critical để avoid harming subgroups

questions.prompt: 'Resampling' trong imbalanced classification: SMOTE tạo synthetic samples bằng:

options.text: Interpolate giữa minority samples trong feature space

questions.explanation: SMOTE: chọn minority sample, find k-NN, interpolate → synthetic sample along the line segment

questions.prompt: 'Calibration curve' trong ML đo gì?

options.text: Alignment giữa predicted probability và actual fraction of positives

questions.explanation: Calibration: perfect model → khi predict P=0.8, 80% thực sự positive. Dùng reliability diagram

questions.prompt: 'Stratified sampling' trong data collection đảm bảo:

options.text: Mỗi subgroup được represent proportionally trong sample

questions.explanation: Stratified: divide population into strata, sample from each → reduce sampling bias, better estimates per group

questions.prompt: 'Uplift modeling' trong marketing đo:

options.text: Incremental impact của treatment trên individual level

questions.explanation: Uplift = P(convert|treatment) - P(convert|control). Target persuadables not sure-things or lost-causes

questions.prompt: 'Online learning' vs 'Batch learning':

options.text: Online: update model incrementally với each new data point → adapt to concept drift

questions.explanation: Online learning: SGD per sample → adapt to streaming data, concept drift. Batch: retrain from scratch periodically

questions.prompt: 'Bayesian optimization' cho hyperparameter tuning sử dụng:

options.text: Surrogate model (Gaussian Process/TPE) để guide search efficiently

questions.explanation: Bayesian opt: model P(metric|hyperparams) → acquisition function chọn hyperparams promising nhất → fewer evaluations

questions.prompt: 'Reproducibility crisis' trong AI research liên quan đến:

options.text: Papers không thể reproduce vì unreported details, cherry-picking

questions.explanation: Reproducibility: missing code, data, hyperparams. Solution: open-source, model cards, benchmarks

questions.prompt: 'Automation bias' là:

options.text: Humans over-rely on automated decisions, ignoring contradicting evidence

questions.explanation: Automation bias: dangerous khi AI wrong nhưng human trust it. Important trong medical, aviation HITL systems

questions.prompt: Phân tích logic: 'A→B, B đúng'. Kết luận về A?
questions.explanation: Affirming the consequent fallacy: A→B, B đúng KHÔNG → A đúng. B có thể true vì reasons khác

questions.prompt: 'Environmental cost' của AI (carbon footprint) quan trọng vì:

options.text: Training large models → enormous energy → CO2. Sustainability must balance với capability

questions.explanation: GPT-3 training ≈ 552 tấn CO2. Responsible AI: consider efficiency, use renewable energy, model compression

questions.prompt: 'Negative externalities' của AI products là:

options.text: Costs borne by society không reflected trong pricing (VD: misinformation, job displacement)

questions.explanation: Externalities: social media AI amplifying misinformation, gig economy reducing worker protections

questions.prompt: Mệnh đề: 'P hoặc Q. Không phải P. Vậy...'
questions.explanation: Disjunctive syllogism: P∨Q, ¬P → Q

questions.prompt: 'Trustworthy AI' theo EU guidelines yêu cầu. Điều nào KHÔNG có trong 7 yêu cầu?
questions.explanation: EU Trustworthy AI 7 keys: Human agency, Robustness, Privacy, Transparency, Diversity, Societal wellbeing, Accountability

questions.prompt: 'Long-termism' trong AI safety tập trung vào:

options.text: Long-term risks từ advanced AI: misalignment, catastrophic outcomes

questions.explanation: AI safety: existential risk from AGI, instrumental convergence, value alignment challenges as AI scales
